case_title: EMIL P MILYAKOV et al VS. JP MORGAN CHASE, NA et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE (CCP 170.6); DECLARATION OF SELIA ACEVEDO IN SUPPORT FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE CO. MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC. (MERS) JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS EMIL MILYAKOV, MAGDALENA APOSTOLOVA'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY AND PERMANENT INJUNCTION WILL BE HEARD BY JUDGE MCBRIDE ON NOVEMBER 30, 2011 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 220 DUE TO THE CCP 170.6 CHALLENGE TO JUDGE KAHN. IT IS THE COURT'S UNDERSTANDING THAT THE FORECLOSURE IS SET FOR DECEMBER 7, 2011 SO A TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER IS UNNECESSARY. IF THE SALE IS SET ON OR BEFORE NOVEMBER 30, THEN, PER JUDGE MCBRIDE, THE SALE IS TEMPORARILY ENJOINED UNTIL THE MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS HEARD. NO COURT REPORTER WILL BE PROVIDED FOR THE HEARING. IF ANY PARTY DESIRES A COURT REPORTER, THE PARTIES SHOULD MEET AND CONFER TO AGREE ON A SINGLE REPORTER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, NOT REPORTED.

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
DEFENDANTS JP MORGAN CHASE, NA, CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INCORPORATED'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Off calendar. The demurrer withdrawn on December 30, 2011. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =(302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Otion For Leave To File A Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-21-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on defendants Emil Milyakov and Magdalena Apostolova's motion for leave to file a second amended complaint.
Department 220. Judge: James J. McBride; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Not Reported.

Plaintiff Magdalena Apostolova was present in pro per.
Plaintiff Emil Milyakov was not present at today's hearing.
Selia Acevedo, Esq. appeared for defendants JP Morgan Chase, et al.

After hearing oral argument by plaintiff and defense counsel, and good cause appearing, plaintiffs' motion for leave to file a second amended complaint is GRANTED. Defendants JP Morgan Chase, et al. shall have until February 3, 2012 in which to file a responsive pleading to plaintiff's second amended complaint.

Order granting plaintiffs' motion was submitted to and signed by the Court.
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary And Permanent Injunction

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary And Permanent Injunction
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Continued To Nov-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 220
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS EMIL MILYAKOV, MAGDALENA APOSTOLOVA'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY AND PERMANENT INJUNCTION. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: this motion will be heard by Judge McBride on November 30, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 due to the CCP 170.6 challenge to Judge Kahn. It is the court's understanding that the foreclosure is set for December 7, 2011 so a temporary restraining order is unnecessary. If the sale is set on or before November 30, then, per Judge McBride, the sale is temporarily enjoined until the motion for preliminary injunction is heard. No court reporter will be provided for the hearing. If any party desires a court reporter, the parties should meet and confer to agree on a single reporter. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.
